name: berrysdk
description: Berry SDK monorepo for WhatsApp Web SDK, transport, proto wrappers, and publishing packages.
author: Lipe Devv and Berry Protocol

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/events packages/transport packages/protocol packages/messages packages/wa-message packages/media packages/store packages/auth packages/socket packages/core packages/berry-otp packages/berryprotocol packages/berryotp packages/gateway packages/cli
scripts.clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem packages -Directory | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force (Join-Path $_.FullName 'dist') -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force (Join-Path $_.FullName '.tsbuildinfo') -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
scripts.prepare:publish: npm run clean && npm run build
